creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Messages:
^Triage: Please set the maintainer-approval attachment flag (to +) on patches for ports you maintain to signify approval.
--
Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

^Triage: Maintainer-feedback flag (+) not required unless requested (?) first.

kdheepak-taskwarrior-tui-v0.20.1_GH0.tar.gz") modifier U make: Unclosed variable specification (expecting '}') for "" (value "task-hookrs@git+https://github.com/kdheepak/task-hookrs kdheepak-taskwarrior-tui-v0.20.1_GH0.tar.gz") modifier U make

^Triage: Please confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least).
--
